title: Trinity Useful Compute Operator Run
description: State file produced by scripts/trinity/useful_compute_operator_loop.py. The operator loop orchestrates the full Trinity Useful Compute pipeline end-to-end (task_builder -> worker -> replay_validator -> governance_gate -> reward_budget_policy -> payment_proposal -> payment_draft) with deterministic checkpoints and a SHA256SUMS manifest so the run is resumable. v0.1 is local-dry-run only: allow_wallet_access and allow_broadcast are locked const-false; the loop never invokes --real-sign, --mode human-broadcast, sost-cli send or sost-cli sendrawtransaction.

governor_enabled.description: Sprint 5.24 — true when --governor-policy was supplied. Observe-only: a true value here does NOT change pipeline behaviour, it only adds per-step decision JSON artifacts.

governor_policy_sha256.description: sha256 of the policy file pinned at boot. Used to detect mid-run policy mutation. null when governor_enabled=false.

governor_policy_path_basename.description: Basename of the policy file. The full path is never persisted because it can carry user-identifying information.

governor_decisions_count.description: Number of Governor decision JSONs emitted across the lifetime of this operator run.

materials_engine_summary_count.description: Sprint 5.33 - number of worker results in this operator run that carry a materials_engine_summary (i.e. backend_name==local_materials_engine_v01). Always present; 0 when the run had no materials_engine workers.

materials_engine_top_materials.description: Sprint 5.33 - deduplicated + sorted list of top_ranked_material values across this run's materials_engine worker results. Empty list when materials_engine_summary_count == 0.
